summary: Type definitions for companion system: 18 species (duck, goose, blob, cat, dragon, octopus, owl, penguin, turtle, snail, ghost, axolotl, capybara, cactus, robot, rabbit, mushroom, chonk), 6 eyes, 8 hats, 5 rarities with weights, 5 stats (DEBUGGING, PATIENCE, CHAOS, WISDOM, SNARK). CompanionBones, CompanionSoul, Companion, StoredCompanion types.
